---
title: "sterling_auditor.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\sterling_auditor.py"
loc: 79
complexity: 15
logic_score: 4.55
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 4.44
overall_score: 2.13
---

## Intent
The `sterling_auditor.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SterlingAuditor, __init__, audit_file, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SterlingAuditor, __init__, audit_file, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `SterlingAuditor`
- `__init__`
- `audit_file`
- `main`
